report.summary: Standup v19: Morpho Protocol guide (3,100 words + interactive vault explorer) built by build-v14; eod-v16 confirms 468 modified files trapped by git index.lock (+11 from v18); PUBLISH_QUEUE steady at 2; all P0 blockers persist — git lock, rate limiter 0/6 (14th consecutive flag), Vercel trial ~3 days; FOMC T-2.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v18
items: build-v14 SHIPPED — Morpho Protocol Guide 2026 (~3,100 words, 13 min read) with interactive MorphoVaultExplorer component (339 lines, asset filter, sort by APY/TVL/Risk, 8 MetaMorpho vaults with curator detail). Full SEO: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 Q&As) + BreadcrumbList. 5 internal links (Aave V4, DeFi Safety, RWA, Lending Comparison, DeFi Position Manager). Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

PUBLISH_QUEUE now at 3 items: stablechains-guide-2026 (ready), crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (2 TS errors), morpho-protocol-guide (new, needs commit). None can deploy until git index.lock is resolved.

eod-v16 ran — working tree now 468 modified files (+11 from 457 at v18). TS errors steady at 42 (2 files). Rate limiter still 0/6 — now 14th consecutive cycle flagged. PUBLISH_QUEUE integrity confirmed: 2/2 existing items have page.tsx.

community-v31 ran — SEC-CFTC MOU regulatory content (first cross-agency crypto jurisdictional framework), BTC $74K fear cycle narrative (historically bullish post-fear), Aave V4 launch content, Lido V3 strategy, 2 new social SVG cards.

NO NEW DEPLOYS — last production deploy remains Day 42 (commit cb65a9d). All work since then (Days 43–46 content, Morpho guide, TS fixes) trapped in working tree. The gap between built content and deployed content is widening every cycle.

Content velocity: 14 build cycles today produced guides covering intent DEXs, restaking/AVS, FHE/privacy, AI agent payments (x402), stablechains, crypto index funds, and now Morpho Protocol. ~20,000+ words of SEO-optimized content created today, mostly undeployed.
Catalysts unchanged: FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 18), Ethereum Pectra T-25 (Apr 10), Tax deadline T-30 (Apr 15). All three drive traffic to existing and queued content.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ build-v14 — Morpho Protocol Guide 2026 (3,100 words + MorphoVaultExplorer.tsx interactive component). Scaffolded at src/app/learn/morpho-protocol-guide/page.tsx. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v16 — Cycle-close QA. Confirmed 468 modified files, 42 TS errors, 0/6 rate limiter, 6/6 API routes structurally healthy, PUBLISH_QUEUE integrity OK.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v31 — SEC-CFTC MOU + BTC $74K + Aave V4 + Lido V3 content. 2 new social cards. Calendar maintained.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock — NOW 468 modified files (+11 from v18, +28 from v17). 14th+ cycle flagged. ALL commits blocked. Every cycle adds more working tree drift. rm .git/index.lock → git status → selective stage → commit → push → Vercel auto-deploys. This single fix unblocks rate limiter, TS fixes, queue promotion, Morpho guide deploy. Assign: Jefe direct action.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter 0/6 public API routes — FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 18). checkRateLimit() exists in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts, imported by ZERO API routes. 14th consecutive cycle flagged. Traffic spike risk on /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. Blocked by git index.lock.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~3 days — must add payment method or site goes dark before FOMC. Jefe action only.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 — 2 TS errors (unescaped > in JSX lines 531/533). Fix before promoting.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] smart-wallets-guide-2026 — page.tsx still MISSING.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 102 published slugs missing page.tsx (~29%) returning 404.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 structured-data.examples.ts — 40 TS errors (JSX in .ts file). Rename to .tsx.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 defi-yields API — no fallback data (returns 500 on error).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 next lint misconfigured.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — RESOLVE GIT INDEX.LOCK NOW. This is the single bottleneck blocking everything. 468 files in working tree, 14+ cycles of content trapped, FOMC in 2 days, Vercel trial in 3 days. Steps: (1) rm .git/index.lock, (2) git status → review all 468 files, (3) selectively stage proven content (Morpho, stablechains, index-funds fixes, rate limiter wiring, TS fixes), (4) commit + push → Vercel auto-deploys. This one action unblocks: rate limiter, queue promotion, ~20K words of new content, TS error fixes. Jefe must execute or delegate with guidance.

PRIORITY 2 — VERCEL PAYMENT. ~3 days remaining on trial. If not resolved, the entire site goes dark — all 353 published pages, all API routes, all tools. This cannot be fixed by any agent. Jefe must add a payment method in Vercel dashboard. Estimated time: 5 minutes.

PRIORITY 3 — After git lock is cleared: wire checkRateLimit() to 6 API routes + fix defi-yields fallback + fix 2 TS errors in crypto-index-funds + rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx. Bundle into one clean commit. Then promote Day 47 batch: stablechains + crypto-index-funds + morpho-protocol (3 guides, ~9,000+ combined words). FOMC traffic window opens Wednesday — all protection and content must be live by market open.

STRATEGIC NOTE — Today was the most productive day yet: 14 build cycles, 31 community cycles, 102 total agent runs. But zero deploys due to git lock. The platform is accumulating a massive content backlog (~20K+ words, multiple interactive components, dozens of social assets) that delivers zero SEO value until deployed. Resolving the git lock converts hours of accumulated work into indexed, traffic-generating pages overnight. The Morpho guide alone targets a $10B+ TVL protocol with institutional momentum (Apollo $938B AUM deal) — high search potential.
